section.heading: Applications for assistance

content.p: An application for assistance under this chapter shall be submitted in such form and in accordance with such procedures as the Administrator shall establish.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 103–325, title I, § 178, as added Pub. L. 106–102, title VII, § 725, Nov. 12, 1999, 113 Stat. 1474.)
